Meet the Doctor
Dr. Iftekhar Khan
MBBS, MD Dermatology
🏛️ AIIMS Delhi

Dr. Iftekhar Khan is an experienced dermatologist specializing in skin, hair, laser, and aesthetic treatments. He focuses on accurate diagnosis and personalized care to deliver safe, natural, and long-lasting results.

At Truederm, treatments are designed based on the root cause of the problem rather than temporary solutions — each treatment carefully customized for the individual.

🔬
Expert DiagnosisRoot-cause based treatment approach
💊
Personalized CareCustom plans for every patient
⚡
Advanced TechnologyModern equipment & techniques
Our Space

A Premium Clinic Environment

Designed for your comfort — clean, modern, and welcoming.

🛋️ Comfortable Waiting Lounge — Premium, air-conditioned waiting area

Treatments

Our Services

Expert care for all skin and hair concerns using evidence-based treatments.

✨
Skin Treatments
Targeted solutions for common and complex skin concerns.
Acne TreatmentPigmentationDark CirclesSkin Allergy
💆
Hair Treatments
Expert solutions for hair loss, thinning, and hair transplant.
Hair LossHair TransplantScalp Care
💉
Aesthetic Treatments
Non-surgical cosmetic procedures for natural-looking results.
BotoxAnti-AgeingSkin Rejuvenation
🔆
Laser Treatments
Advanced laser for resurfacing, hair removal, and pigmentation.
Laser TherapySkin ResurfacingHair Removal
